results.title: The spicy, snarky and surprisingly candid remarks from SEC coaches this week
results.description: The SEC has a bruised ego, and that along with a fluid collegiate landscape had them sounding off at the league's spring meetings.

results.title: Newman wins Humboldt’s first individual state title
results.description: WINFIELD — Humboldt sophomore Connor Newman has good reason to believe his reign over Kansas high school golf has only just begun after winning the 2A state championship Wednesday at the Quail Ridge Golf Course.... The post Newman wins Humboldt’s first individual state title appeared first on The Iola Register .

results.title: Teenage girl died after being swept out to sea while ‘posing for pictures’
results.description: A 15-year-old girl was swept out to sea “in a blink” as she and her friend took photos of themselves in front of a raging sea, an inquest has heard.

results.title: Red Sox place Garrett Whitlock on the 15-day injured list with left knee inflammation
results.description: The right-hander told reporters that his landing leg slipped during his first warm-up pitch of the outing, resulting in a hyperextension.

results.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Lowers Capri (NYSE:CPRI) Price Target to $29.00
results.description: Capri (NYSE:CPRI – Get Free Report) had its price objective decreased by JPMorgan Chase & Co. from $31.00 to $29.00 in a research report issued on Thursday,Benzinga reports. The firm presently has an “overweight” rating on the stock. JPMorgan Chase & Co.‘s target price points to a potential upside of 47.35% from the stock’s current [...]
